dict.string: Viboplr needs access to your Desktop folder to scan for music files and manage your library.
Viboplr needs access to your Documents folder to scan for music files and manage your library.
Viboplr needs access to your Downloads folder to scan for music files and save downloaded tracks.
Viboplr needs access to your Music folder to scan for music files and manage your library.
Viboplr needs access to removable volumes to scan for music files.
